texto: Allan praised Herbert for a job well done and for acting the part well. Herbert blushed, while dismissing the praise, saying it wasn't hard to play stupid when you are stupid. Allan said that he didn't know how hard it was, because the idiots Allan had met so far in his life had all tried to do the opposite.
explicacao: Citação de Jonasson sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Allan praised Herbert for a job well done and for acting the part well. Herbert blushed, while di…” articula reflexao, humorous, allan em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
